title: Intermediate Nether Wart
description: Makes the two half-way stages of nether wart visually distinct.
body:
# Intermediate Nether Wart
## Summary
Makes the two half-way stages of nether wart visually distinct. This allows you to better understand how far your nether warts are from being ready to harvest, instead of having to guess or use <kbd>F3</kbd> to see an accurate representation of its middle stages.
## Compatibility Notice
This should work with other resource packs that change the _textures_ of nether wart, but don't expect this to work with resource packs that change the _models_ of nether wart.
## Before & After Screenshots
| ![An image of a all stages of nether wart, without the pack applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lqBZ25av/images/cf7205c483d63e018963fddd9c9d679be34e6d77.png)  | ![An image of a all stages of nether wart, with the pack applied.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lqBZ25av/images/2a721fc06a88a1eddd2ad191904cdbb91ade264a.png) |
|:---:|:---:|
